center.name: 胡安·費爾南德斯群島
center.summary: 胡安·費爾南德斯群島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括黑颈天鹅、Kermadec petrel、Stejneger's petrel等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: baeckstroemii is found only on Alejandro Selkirk Island in Chile's Juan Fernández Archipelago. The grey-flanked cinclodes inhabits open grassy and rocky landscapes, and in mountains is often found near streams

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It breeds in the Pacific Ocean from Lord Howe Island to the Juan Fernández Islands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It occurs in the Pacific Ocean, nesting in the Cerro de Los Inocentes mountain of the Juan Fernández Islands off Chile. Outside the breeding season Stejneger's petrel migrates to the waters of the north-west Pacific off Japan

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Argentina, mainland Chile, and the Juan Fernández Islands.{{cite web |url=https://www.worldbirdnames.org/ |title=IOC World Bird List (v 12.1) |last1=Gill |first1= F

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Vagrants have been found on Juan Fernández Island, the South Orkney Islands, the South Shetland Islands, and the Antarctic Peninsula. The black-necked swan inhabits freshwater marshes and swamps, shallow lakes, brackish lagoons, and sheltered coastal sites
